content: The intrinsic reward signals generated by curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning gate for 2025 SOTA active learning agent episodic memory, only encoding novel unexpected experiences that exceed a prediction error threshold aligned with the curiosity framework. This turns intrinsic curiosity's measure of surprise into a built-in efficiency filter for large agent memory banks.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
